title: erigeron thunbergii var. heterotrichus
intro: Erigeron thunbergii var. heterotrichus, also known as Japanese fleabane, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Japanese fleabane include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
